title: Strengthen blog Codeberg-first evaluator path
expected_outcome: Blog readers move from owned-content interest into Codeberg inspection, first-task selection, and a real overnight evaluation path.
measurement_window: Review blog engagement and downstream Codeberg-linked movement within 7 days.
changes: Added a reusable blog evaluator CTA partial with Codeberg-primary, first-task-guide, install, and GitHub-mirror actions
Injected the evaluator CTA into the blog index and individual blog posts
Added request-spec coverage so the blog surfaces keep the Codeberg-first evaluator path
